text_original: I will give it 5 stars but first time it was good but now it wont open saying network eror but my network completely good
text_zh: 我会给它打5星，但第一次用的时候挺好的，现在却打不开了，提示网络错误，但我的网络明明很好。
reply_original: Hi! So sorry for the network error. Please try clearing the app cache, restarting your phone, or switching between Wi-Fi and mobile data. If it still won't open, please email us at support@fantachat.ai with your UID and device details. We'll investigate immediately to get you back to a 5-star experience!
reply_zh: 你好！非常抱歉出现网络错误。请尝试清除应用缓存、重启手机，或在 Wi-Fi 和移动数据之间进行切换。如果仍然无法打开，请发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai，并提供您的 UID 和设备信息。我们会立即进行排查，帮您恢复五星级的体验！
